name: coTfsSetTestModuleNodeId
title: coTfsSetTestModuleNodeId
description: The function set the node-ID of the tester. This is particularly necessary for the application profile. The function has to be called before the first use of SDOs.

parameters.name: nodeId
parameters.description: Node-ID of the tester, if application profile 447 is used the valid range is 1..16.
